message:
fix(ufunc,io): fix binary_repr negative sign-magnitude and remove dead code

fnp-ufunc: Fix binary_repr for negative numbers without explicit width
to use sign-magnitude format ("-{bits}") instead of two's complement,
matching NumPy's behavior. Keep two's complement for explicit width.
Update iinfo docstring. Add test for sign-magnitude negative case.

fnp-io: Remove unused parse_header_keys() function. Rename local
variable from token to part in parse_shape_tuple for clarity.

Regenerate raptorq sidecar artifacts and oracle fixture outputs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
